records.ety: [F. adroit; (L. ad) = droit straight, right, fr. L. directus, p. p. of dirigere. See Direct.]

defs: Dexterous in the use of the hands or in the exercise of the mental faculties; exhibiting skill and readiness in avoiding danger or escaping difficulty; ready in invention or execution; -- applied to persons and to acts; as, an adroit mechanic, an adroit reply.
